title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Ernst & Young Estate Ltd
body: "Application number 5262  Applicant Eygn Limited objected to the name used by Ernst & Young Estate Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 6 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Ernst & Young Estate Ltd is changed to 13539818, Ltd. "
